name: pow-snapshot-weekly
description: Weekly org documentation refresh + proactive advisor for Protect Our Winters
prompt: Run /snapshot-org to completion, then run /advisor against the refreshed snapshot.
notes: Runs every Monday at 9am UTC. /snapshot-org queries production, regenerates knowledge/*.md, commits to main. /advisor then diffs the new snapshot against the previous one: drift (out-of-pipeline changes) is reported to Slack, and up to 3 improvement proposals land in ClickUp tagged advisor-proposed (PRD v5 §5.2). ClickUp + Slack MCP connectors required for the advisor half. SF_CLIENT_ID not set — setup skips sandbox auth.
